children.heading: Disclaimer of Congressional approval of other agreements, understandings, or commitments
children.label: a Disclaimer of Congressional approval of other agreements, understandings, or commitments
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter is intended to signify approval by the Congress of any agreement, understanding, or commitment made by the executive branch other than the agreement to participate in the Multinational Force and Observers as set forth in the exchanges of letters between the United States and Egypt and between the United States and Israel which were signed on .August 3, 1981

children.heading: Limitations on United States participation
children.label: b Limitations on United States participation
children.text: The limitations contained in this subchapter with respect to United States participation in the Multinational Force and Observers apply to the exercise of the authorities provided by this subchapter or provided by any other provision of law. No funds appropriated by the Congress may be obligated or expended for any activity which is contrary to the limitations contained in this subchapter.

children.heading: War Powers Resolution
children.label: c War Powers Resolution
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall affect the responsibilities of the President or the Congress under the War Powers Resolution () [ et seq.].Public Law 93–14850 U.S.C. 1541
